channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UDSM receives international funding to expand food security and supply chain research in Africa
item.description: The University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM), through its Business School, has secured close to Sh6 billion (€1.98 million) in funding to support research, innovation and human capital development in sustai...

item.title: Becky Barnicoat cartoon explores the escalating complexity of organising modern life
item.description: This illustrated piece by Becky Barnicoat presents a humorous take on the challenges of getting one’s life in order, particularly within a modern, often chaotic context. Structured around the idea of ...

item.title: Amotekun arrests suspected criminals using disguise tactics in Ondo anti-kidnapping operation
item.description: The Ondo State Security Network Agency, known as Amotekun Corps, has arrested 98 suspected criminals across different parts of the state, including individuals described as fake mentally unstable pers...

item.title: Sonko halts NEDP operations amid allegations of extortion and internal leadership disputes
item.description: Former Nairobi Governor Mike Sonko has announced the suspension of all activities of the National Economic Development Party (NEDP) following serious allegations of corruption and internal disagreemen...

item.title: Mass protest in Madrid calls for resignation of Spanish Prime Minister amid corruption allegations
item.description: Tens of thousands of people took to the streets of Madrid on Saturday in a large-scale demonstration calling for Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez to resign following a series of corruption-related...

item.title: Cardinal Advincula: Santacruzan is a reminder to live out the Catholic faith, not just a tradition
item.description: Manila Cardinal Jose Advincula has reminded the faithful that the Santacruzan is not simply a colourful parade or a beauty-pageant-style procession, but a meaningful Catholic devotion that calls for d...

item.title: Flotilla activists allege mistreatment during interception by Israeli forces amid Israel-Hamas conflict
item.description: Activists who were part of a humanitarian flotilla bound for Gaza have reported allegations of harsh treatment after being intercepted by Israeli forces, according to an Associated Press report publis...

item.title: Review highlights major imbalance in UK spending on youth benefits versus employment support
item.description: A major government-commissioned review into youth inactivity in the UK has found that significantly more public money is spent on welfare benefits for young people than on programmes designed to help ...

item.title: Poll Shows Strong Opposition to Kristi Noem’s Potential Political Comeback in South Dakota
item.description: A new poll indicates that former Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem faces significant resistance from voters in her home state of South Dakota if she were to seek public office agai...

item.title: Federal Government begins distribution of emergency maternal and newborn care equipment to 251 hospitals across 30 states
item.description: The Federal Government don begin distribution of Comprehensive Emergency Obstetric and Newborn Care (CEmONC) equipment to 251 health facilities across 30 states for Nigeria. The programme, wey Federal...

item.title: Republican Lawmakers Express Growing Distance from Trump Amid Policy and Election Concerns
item.description: A Raw Story report highlights increasing tension within the Republican Party as some lawmakers reportedly distance themselves from President Donald Trump amid declining approval ratings and controvers...

item.title: Trump Shares Provocative Post About Iran as Speculation Grows Over Possible U.S. Military Action
item.description: A Raw Story article reported that President Donald Trump posted an image on Truth Social suggesting the idea of the United States taking control of Iran. The image reportedly showed a map of Iran cove...

item.title: South Africa to introduce policy to improve prosecutor safety amid rising threats
item.description: The Department of Justice and Constitutional Development is preparing to table a draft policy aimed at strengthening the protection and safety of prosecutors in South Africa, following a concerning ri...

item.title: Nyeri County Opens 370 Internship Positions Across 15 Departments for 2026 Graduates and Final-Year Students
item.description: Nyeri County Public Service Board has announced 370 internship opportunities across 15 county departments in what has been described as the biggest intake since the internship programme started seven ...

item.title: Collingwood fears serious knee injury for Jamie Elliott during Pendlebury milestone win
item.description: Collingwood’s 10-point AFL win over West Coast at the MCG was overshadowed by a potentially serious knee injury to forward Jamie Elliott during Scott Pendlebury’s record-breaking 433rd game. Elliott w...

item.title: Julie Burchill reflects on Marilyn Monroe’s enduring cultural legacy ahead of her centenary
item.description: The article is an opinion piece by journalist Julie Burchill reflecting on the lasting influence and cultural significance of Marilyn Monroe as the world approaches the 100th anniversary of the actres...

item.title: JC Santos expresses gratitude after joining the cast of 'Ang Babae Sa Septic Tank 4' theatre production

item.title: Kiraitu Murungi’s wife delivers emotional tribute at daughter Anita Kendi’s burial

item.title: NRL Round 12 highlights: Sea Eagles vs Titans at 4 Pines Park
item.description: This article provides a highlights recap of the Round 12 NRL Premiership clash between the Manly Sea Eagles and the Gold Coast Titans, played at 4 Pines Park in Sydney. The content focuses on key vide...
